title: Insights
description: Stage 2 output — list of insights derived from profile. Each insight is a reframing/synthesis, not a raw pain.

type.description: Insight archetype — drives formula choice in Stage 3

title_vi.description: Short label, e.g., 'Mâu thuẫn: đăng đều vs. POV'

statement_vi.description: Full insight statement using customer voice/vocabulary

verbatim_quotes.description: Quotes from profile.voice.verbatim_bank that ground this insight

hidden_cost.description: For PAS-style: what does NOT solving this cost them? (time/money/identity). Null if not applicable.

reframe_angle.description: The new POV that flips the narrative — fuel for Hot Take/contradiction posts. Null if not applicable.

novelty_score.description: 1=generic (already in 200 other posts), 5=original POV unique to this brand

applicable_goals.description: Which content goals this insight can serve

recommended_formulas.description: v1 active set: 6 formulas. Auto-suggested by mapping table from storytelling-and-hooks.md Section 3
